description_long: This nightstand features a simple, boxy structure with a light beige or tan finish, supported by four angled wooden legs that give it a mid-century modern appearance. The front face includes a single drawer with a small, round knob handle, providing a functional storage compartment. The sides and back are plain, with no visible ornamentation or additional features. The top surface is flat and spacious enough to support small items such as a lamp, books, or personal belongings. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a neutral color palette that would blend well in various urban environments. The materials appear to be primarily wood or engineered wood, with a smooth, matte finish.
description: A minimalist, light beige nightstand with a single drawer and angled wooden legs, featuring a smooth, matte finish and a simple round knob handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the single drawer with a round knob handle and the angled wooden legs.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the plain, unadorned side panel and the profile of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a featureless back panel and the full width of the top surface.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with the knob handle of the drawer slightly visible.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
